overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long MP Daily ETF (MPG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of MP Materials Corporation (NYSE: MP) stock, less fees, and expenses. MP is a rare-earth materials company that operates the Mountain Pass mine in California, supplying critical minerals for EVs, wind turbines, and defense technologies. MPG was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
